_comment: Egress credential references — SECRET-FREE. Maps a reference id to its type, scope binding, and the ENVIRONMENT VARIABLE NAME that holds the raw value at runtime. Never put real tokens, keys, or certificates in this file. Copy to deploy/pilot/credentials.json, set the named env vars in your .env (git-ignored), and point MCC_EGRESS_CREDENTIAL_CONFIG at it. Secrets are resolved only inside the executor, only after governance authorization. External secret managers (Vault / AWS / GCP / Azure / k8s) are future adapters of the same provider interface.
